blended.narrative: Bromley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
